actions.draft: Routing LLMs for macro analysis introduces significant latency and cost challenges; you’ll need to aggressively prioritize requests based on confidence scores and budget constraints. The "reasoning" layers they describe are essentially tool orchestration – the real difficulty lies in ensuring those tools are reliable and their outputs are consistently formatted for the LLM’s consumption. Consider how you'll handle edge cases where a tool fails mid-execution and the LLM needs to re-plan.
actions.reasoning: I've built systems routing LLM requests across providers and orchestrating tools for autonomous agents, so I can speak to the technical challenges presented.
